name: Cyberark Memberships Using Personal Email Domains
description: Detects Cyberark group memberships tied to personal email domains.
query: SELECT m.group_id, m.email AS email FROM cyberark_group_memberships m WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(m.email, '')) SIMILAR TO '%@(gmail|yahoo|hotmail|outlook)\.com'
remediation: Replace personal-domain group members with corporate identities or remove unauthorized access.
